data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time tracking by project phase and deliverable.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for time tracking by project phase and deliverable. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or validated. The linked use case mentions the need for time tracking but lacks concrete evidence or endpoints to support the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of time tracking by project phase and deliverable being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for time tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the time tracking by project phase and deliverable.
